summary: Build a simple website that includes a button.

existing_features.title: Create a single-page website that renders a clear primary button on the page.
Define a simple button interaction: when the button is clicked, show immediate on-page feedback (e.g., increment a visible click counter or display a short confirmation message).
Apply a coherent visual theme across the page (colors, typography, spacing, and layout) with a distinct style appropriate for a minimal landing page, and keep it consistent.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a basic website page with a button
